zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis III de Chiny於1141年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 盧森堡時，他的父親Albert Ier de Chiny43歲，母親Agnès de Bar23歲。他於1172年與Sophie d'Aspremont結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1189年8月10日在比利時迪瑟 德 納姆爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis III de Chiny于1141年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 盧森堡时，他的父亲Albert Ier de Chiny43岁，母亲Agnès de Bar23岁。他于1172年与Sophie d'Aspremont结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1189年8月10日在比利时迪瑟 德 納姆爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chiny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: from the feminine form of the personal name   Chino  .
Italian (Sicily): nickname from chinu, china ‘full of water, bloated, fat’.
English: probably a variant of the extinct name Chiney through association with the country-name.

variants.name: Chino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Avelino, Ezequiel, Fernando, Francisco, Homero, Humberto, Joaquin, Jose Hector, Manuel, Maricela, Paulino.  Japanese Aki, Hideki, Hirohito, Hiroki, Kazumi, Kazuo, Shigeru, Taro, Yuriko, Yutaka.
Hispanic (mainly Mexico): from Mexican Spanish adjective chino ‘curly’. This surname is also common among Native Americans (Pueblos) in NM.
Hispanic and Amerindian (Peru and Bolivia): nickname from chino ‘person of mixed Amerindian and European parentage’ or ‘servant’, a word of Quechuan origin.

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Louis III de Chiny was born in 1141, in Luxemburg, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Albert Ier de Chiny, was 43 and his mother, Agnès de Bar, was 23. He married Sophie d'Aspremont in 1172. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 10 August 1189, in Namur, Belgium, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis III de Chiny est né en 1141, à Luxembourg, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Albert Ier de Chiny, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Bar, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sophie d'Aspremont en 1172. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 août 1189, à Diocèse de Namur, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis III de Chiny 1141 in Herzogtum Luxemburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albert Ier de Chiny 43 und seine Mutter Agnès de Bar 23. Er hat 1172 Sophie d'Aspremont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. August 1189 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Bistum Namur, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis III de Chiny è nato il nel 1141 nel Herzogtum Luxemburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Albert Ier de Chiny, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Bar, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Sophie d'Aspremont nel 1172. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 agosto 1189, nel Diocèse de Namur, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis III de Chinyが1141年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチハーゾグトゥム ルクセンブルグで生まれた時，父Albert Ier de Chinyは43歳，母Agnès de Barは23歳であった。1172年にSophie d'Aspremontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年8月10日にベルギーディオクeゼ ド ナムルで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis III de Chiny(이)가 1141년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 허초그투 루세버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert Ier de Chiny(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Bar(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1172년 Sophie d'Aspremont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년 8월 10일 벨기에 디오ce스 데 남어에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis III de Chiny nasceu em 1141, em Herzogtum Luxemburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Albert Ier de Chiny, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Bar, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sophie d'Aspremont em 1172. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1189, em Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis III de Chiny родился в 1141 г. в местности хирзогтум луксембург, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Albert Ier de Chiny было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Bar, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophie d'Aspremont в 1172 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 августа 1189 г. в местности диокeс де намур, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis III de Chiny nació en 1141, en Herzogtum Luxemburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Albert Ier de Chiny, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Agnès de Bar, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sophie d'Aspremont en 1172. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1189, en Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años.
